这个世界名将都有武将技。
关羽一刀青龙斩，能劈开城墙。
张飞一声战吼，让敌人肝胆俱裂。
赵云无限耐力，冲入敌阵万军取首。
东汉末年天下大乱。
缺德刘备，谨慎关羽，仁义张飞与十八路诸侯共同讨伐董卓。
当别人在规规矩矩使用武将技战斗的时候。
三人把武将技组合在一起使用，把诸侯们都整麻了。
袁绍不禁破口大骂：“谁教你这样用武将技的！？”
曹操：“这还不阴？”
吕布大惊失色，连忙喊道：“赤兔快跑！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/76daa4011be0206e18262fb9825ab5bf","author":"蓝色三角形","author_id":"","book_id":"7504264251138116632","book_name":"三国：他们的武将技不太对劲","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":272,"name":"历史脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=272&name=历史脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":67,"name":"三国","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=67&name=三国&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7504264322839757336","read_count":"93169","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1209795"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.2","serial_count":"587","tags":"历史脑洞,历史,系统,三国,搞笑轻松,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/359ea2d17aba533d09115b9e5b0b8aae~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779444688&x-signature=HnAarhK7gUNbfbVay8baxDafSec%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"103158658605","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"135"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231811287EBDB2A043705AD6E70C"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读10小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":37,"forwarded_count":0,"listen
